description_text: CFR Sports Professional Support Store Store Home New Arrival Ending Soon Add to Favourites View Feedback Contact us Why Buy From us Free Shipping Fast Shipping Within 24 hours 30 Day Money Back Guarantee Trusted Store Satisfaction Guarantee Secure Shopping With Confidence Best Price and Good Quality Professional Customer Service Store Newsletter Featured Products Items Description Feature: Superior Protection: This rear body splitter valance made of high-quality PP - Factory Grade Plastic, which is known for its light-weight, durable and impact resistance, perfectly protects the original bumper from bumps and scratches on the road. Aerodynamic Design: air dam rear under chin spoiler visually enhances the car's performance appearance; it improves aerodynamic efficiency by reducing lift and enhancing stability at high speeds, ensuring driving safety and reducing fuel consumption. Specification: Color: Gloss Black Material: PP - Polypropylene Style: OE Style Type: Rear Bumper Placement on Vehicle: Rear Lower Attachment Method: Screws Surface Finish: Gloss Black Package includes: 1x Rear Diffuser,1x Screw kit Note: 1.Not suitable for vehicles with a centrally located exhaust pipe in rear bumper. 2.For cars with two separate exhaust pipes, the distance between them must be greater than 36.22 inches (92 cm). 3.The underside of the rear bumper must be flat. Before purchasing, please ensure that your vehicle meets these specifications. Installation: Bolt on installation,and comes with all necessary mounting hardwares. Since it is aftermarket auto part, installation instruction is not included. If you find it is difficult to install, professional installation is recommend. Shipping Payment Return Policy Feedback About us Shipping details: Item will be shipped within 1-2 business days after confirmed payment. Please contact us if you do not receive the item over 30 days, we will investigate and solve the delivery problem. Please verify your address during checkout. We are not responsible for any wrong or undeliverable addresses.
